summary: Matched two ftCommon Attack100 air scope item enter functions in src/melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_Attack100.c: fn_800D7C60 for air scope rapid and fn_800D81D0 for air scope fire. The PR body says both mirror their ground counterparts and call ftCommon_ClampAirDrift after Fighter_ChangeMotionState. The bot report records both targeted functions as new 100% matches.
